name: Your "Final" Heist - Break in and steal things
description:
I like Biast I think. everything was written and made before the update came out

Ya it's just all 3 of them put into one, real creative, right?. Pfp is posed by me, models taken from the BIAST discord

This Takes place in the box factory (cus it's my favorite map), idk what you guys did with the bots but this takes place assuming user retrieved all of the artifacts without, yknow, dying

This bot WAS tested and there are a few notable things:
The bot sometimes assumes the artifacts are still in user's possession, just edit the message or redo it idfk, I said it like 10 times in the personality that user doesn't have the artifacts but they still think you do. I also was in the middle of testing this bot when the update came out, I'll be remaking all of the bots (and probably this one too) but the old ones will still be up to chat with.

Some stuff I posed for the pfp image (your DEAD teammates): https://files.catbox.moe/dq4azx.png https://files.catbox.moe/bira8k.png https://files.catbox.moe/w6th8s.png https://files.catbox.moe/ccej92.png https://files.catbox.moe/fcite1.png

Key words and shit: Roblox, Break in and steal things, Biast, Robloxian
creator: CryptiBoyLover
